@tigerwoods @chambleebrandel No material difference in SG Total for Scottie & the average of No. 2-4 on the @Pgatour list...

So, Scottie didn't lose a step this year, nor did the competition get any better.

Just a statistical anomaly in terms of strong SG and few wins for Scheffler. It happens.

tweets.text:
An artificial-intelligence bust (and thus bubble), inflation, and fiscal stress are the three most alarming threats to global prosperity at present, according to the Bank for International Settlements. 
“The global economy remains caught in the crosscurrents of progress and peril,” Basel officials said in the report. “Resilience is being increasingly tested and strained.”
h/t @zerohedge
